notes: Major SEP event — peak ≥10 MeV proton flux ~1494 pfu (S3 Strong) following AR 12673 X8.2 limb event. Demonstrates: (1) proton flux qualifying with strict ≥10 MeV channel match, (2) ≥100 MeV flux not double-counting, (3) 30-min SEP onset dedup window collapsing the 16:25 + 18:00 readings into a single qualifying event when within window, separating when outside. Source: SWPC GOES integral proton archive + DONKI SEP record.
